CustomField.formula: IF(Client_Identifiers__c == 'Canaccede' || Client_Identifiers__c == 'Affirm', Null, CASE( $Profile.Name , 'SDA Community User', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SDA__c , 'SDA Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SDA__c , 'SPL Community User', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c , 'SPL Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c , 'SPL Login Community User', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c , 'SPL Login Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User', Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c, 'Scotia Bank Login Community User', Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c , 'Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Login Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c + Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Community User Readonly', Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c + Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c, Accounts_Needing_Validation_SPL__c + Accounts_Needing_Validation_Scotia__c + Accounts_Needing_Validation_SDA__c ))
CustomField.label: Accounts Needing Validation
